title: Palluw' #6396
definition:
Pallu or Phallu = "distinguished"

 1) the 2nd son of Reuben, father of Eliab, and progenitor of a family
    of Israel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Pallu or Phallu = "distinguished"

 1) the 2nd son of Reuben, father of Eliab, and progenitor of a family
    of Israel

    NASB:  a son of Reuben
